title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths · Packet Lens: Net Site Client Vpn
summary: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net site client vpn increment in a least-privilege management access plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare site-to-site and client-to-site VPNs, clientless access, authentication, authorization, and route scope.
Choose and verify NTP, PTP, and NTS by precision, hierarchy, authentication, delay, and application requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
